findings.title: npm audit reports high/critical vulnerabilities
findings.remediation: Run npm audit fix or update dependencies

findings.title: API routes without standard auth wrappers
findings.remediation: Audit each custom route; prefer withPublic/withActiveUser/withAdmin

findings.title: Middleware skips all /api/* routes
findings.remediation: Defense in depth: optional API rate-limit or auth at edge

findings.title: AI rate limiting has in-memory fallback on serverless
findings.remediation: Rely solely on rate_limit_buckets table in production

findings.title: CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS defined but not enforced in Next config
findings.remediation: Add CORS headers middleware or API route checks

findings.title: Supabase Auth leaked password protection disabled
findings.remediation: Enable in Supabase Dashboard → Authentication → Password security

findings.title: Custom SMTP (Resend) not configured in Supabase Auth
SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY not in local production env / Vercel
findings.remediation: Run npm run sync:supabase-keys (needs SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN) or add key from Dashboard → API

findings.title: Production plans table schema differs from application (GET /plans returns 500)
findings.details: Remote has segment/code/status; app expects name/target_type/is_active
findings.remediation: Deploy listPlans() legacy fallback; long-term: align Supabase schema with migrations

findings.title: Supabase admin client falls back to anon key in non-production only
GitHub Actions use mutable version tags (@v4)
admin-check endpoint skips banned/disabled account validation
Health endpoint exposes dbError in non-production only (verify prod)
